name: Inngest
description: Durable execution and event-driven workflows for TypeScript, Python, and Go

name: Trigger.dev
description: Open-source background jobs and AI agent platform with durable tasks, no timeouts, and realtime

name: Pingzo
description: Free tier offers 1 uptime/API monitor with 15-minute check intervals and instant email alerts

name: Val Town
description: Collaborative TypeScript/JavaScript serverless platform for scripts, HTTP endpoints, and cron jobs

name: dlvr.sh
description: Temporary file delivery for agents and automation

name: Codeground
description: Free browser IDE and playgrounds for 15+ languages plus Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis

name: squirrelscan
description: Audits websites for accessibility, SEO, performance, and security with 260+ rules and returns exact fixes for your coding agent, from the CLI, cloud, or MCP

name: LibreDB Studio
description: Browser-based SQL IDE for PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and Redis, with an optional AI assistant that writes SQL from natural language (alternative to DataGrip, DBeaver)

name: snowshare
description: File and link sharing platform with URL shortening, code snippet sharing, and file uploads, featuring customizable expiration, privacy settings, and QR codes

name: Tiramisu
description: BitTorrent engine with a FUSE virtual filesystem that streams torrents live to Plex/Jellyfin without downloading (alternative to Real-Debrid)

name: GitProxy
description: Proxy for Git that applies rules and workflows to all outgoing git push operations and ensures they are compliant
